result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: 0.5249
JUSTIFICATION: The occupancy <n> is determined by the mean-field self-consistency condition, which leads to the transcendental equation n = 1 / (1 + exp(-(mu - epsilon * z * n) / (k_B T))). Solving this equation numerically with the given parameters yields n ≈ 0.5249.
